projects.title: BingeBuddy
description: Created a movie recommender platform using cosine similarity-based content filtering for personalized suggestions.
Trained the model on the TMDB dataset, leveraging movie metadata to capture content similarities.
Achieved an 87% recommendation accuracy, delivering highly relevant movie suggestions.

projects.title: PeerTalks
description: Developed a full-stack chat platform with features including user search, friend requests, and user status.
Implemented real-time communication using Socket.IO, achieving instant message delivery with negligible latency.
Designed MySQL database schema and optimized database queries, reducing data retrieval time by 35%.

projects.title: Toonie
description: Created an AI-powered 2D animation platform converting natural-language prompts into runnable p5.js sketches.
Engineered code generation and refinement workflows that cut manual boilerplate writing by 80%.
Developed advanced features, including clip recording, a persistent media library, and a timeline composer, exporting videos with 25+ clips at smooth 60fps.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Electrical Engineering, Minor in AI/ML

experience.title: Research Intern
description: Designed an ML model (Random Forest, SVM) for water contamination detection, achieving 93% accuracy.
Built an IoT-based anomaly detection system, reducing false alerts.
Contributed to research publications with data visualization (Matplotlib, Seaborn).
